description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Poll asynchronous task status.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Freepik's developer platform (operated through Magnific) provides AI-powered image generation, video generation, image editing, audio generation, and access to Freepik's stock library of vectors, photos, icons, and templates. Asynchronous tasks are polled by task ID.

Contact Support:
 Name: Freepik / Magnific
